name: kai-chattr
description: Clean rebuild of chattr — local multi-agent coordination room (web + api), built to the v3 design standard.

scripts.verify-local: pnpm run check:contracts && pnpm run check:deps && pnpm run test:runtime-contract && pnpm run test:port-drift-contract && pnpm run test:no-api-session-contract && pnpm run test:no-supabase-contract && powershell -NoProfile -Command "Set-Location services/api; uv run python -m compileall app -q; uv run pytest -q" && pnpm --dir apps/web run build && node scripts/dev/verify-runtime.mjs
scripts.neon:dev:db:status: sops exec-env secrets/dev/neon.yaml "powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/dev/check-db-from-env.ps1 -Environment dev"
scripts.neon:dev:migrate: sops exec-env secrets/dev/neon.yaml "powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/dev/run-alembic-from-env.ps1 -Environment dev upgrade head"
scripts.neon:dev:api: sops exec-env secrets/dev/neon.yaml "powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/dev/run-api-from-env.ps1 -Environment dev"
scripts.neon:prod:db:status: sops exec-env secrets/dev/neon.yaml "powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/dev/check-db-from-env.ps1 -Environment prod"
scripts.neon:prod:migrate: sops exec-env secrets/dev/neon.yaml "powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/dev/run-alembic-from-env.ps1 -Environment prod upgrade head"
